instructions.instruction: **Core principle:** Review early, review often. Self-review before PR. Re-review after significant changes.
instructions.original_snippets: **Core principle:** Review early, review often. Self-review before PR. Re-review after significant changes.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger code-review.
